name: Skill Builder
description: Create a new skill, optimize an existing one, or audit skill quality. Guides skill development for this assistant's manifest.json + triggers model.
context: Skill authoring guide. Skills live in skills/<id>/ with a manifest.json (canonical: id, name, description, enabled, triggers[], optional context, optional priority) and an optional SKILL.md (free-text, injected on trigger). Full workflow + manifest schema in skills/skill-builder/SKILL.md and skills/skill-builder/reference.md.
